per_turn_leaks.student_message: Do you have any sweating, nausea, or dizziness with it?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I've been having some night sweats lately - every single night for the past week, actually.

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Does the pain or discomfort spread to any other part of your body?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: I do have some chest pain when I cough or breathe deeply - it's sharp and on my right side. It's pretty uncomfortable!

per_turn_leaks.student_message: Has anyone in your family had other serious medical conditions?
per_turn_leaks.patient_response: My maternal grandmother passed away from lung cancer a few years ago. That's about the only other significant health issue I'm aware of in my family.
